meta.title: Whale Culture
meta.sourceDoc: 111. P3 - Whale Culture 鲸鱼文化.pdf

passageNotes.label: Source
passageNotes.text: Explanations were extracted from the answer-analysis table in the source PDF by OCR. Minor OCR mistakes may remain; the official answer key is used for the answer field.

questionSections.text:
题目 27
答案：YES
PDF 定位：第C段:"Residents live in stable groups... Calves stay with their mothers throughout adulthood, and ... no one has ever seen a whale switch pods."
PDF 解析：题干"remain with their maternal group for life"=文中"throughout 一致，为肯定。

题目 28
答案：NO
PDF 定位：第D段："Transients have only a few such calls... Residents have a much more extensive repertoire."
PDF 解析：题干说"居民群更受限（morerestricted)"，原文恰好相反：过客群 (transients）更少，居民群更"广泛"。故相反。

题目 29
答案：YES
PDF 定位：第D段："Transients have only a few such calls, and all transient societies share the same ones."
PDF 解析：题干"common to all transientkillerwhales"=原文"all transient societiessharethesameones"。语义一致，故是。

题目 30
答案：NO
PDF 定位：第D段:"Despite regular interaction... each resident pod sticks firmly to its own dialect.
PDF 解析：题干称居民群"sharethedialects"，原文强调各居民群坚持各自方言， 不共享；与题干矛盾。

题目 31
答案：NOT GIVEN
PDF 定位：全文未述
PDF 解析：题干问"transient方言是否随时间保持不变"。文中仅说其呼叫"很少、且 各群相同"，未涉及"随时间变化/恒定"的信息，故未给出。

PDF 解析：题干称居民群"sharethedialects"，原文强调各居民群坚持各自方言， 不共享；与题干矛盾。

PDF 解析：题干问"transient方言是否随时间保持不变"。文中仅说其呼叫"很少、且 各群相同"，未涉及"随时间变化/恒定"的信息，故未给出。

questionSections.text:
题目 32
答案：pods
PDF 定位：第C段："Residents live in stable groups, or'pods.."
PDF 解析："固定家族群"在文中专称为pods。

题目 33
答案：physical environment
PDF 定位：第E段:..the variation can't be a product of physical environment."
PDF 解析：摘要说差异"不可能由...导致"，与原文完全同词同义。

题目 34
答案：mother
PDF 定位：第E段："A calf uses the calls of its maternal pod very precisely. There's no input from the father."
PDF 解析：摘要结构"thegrouptowhichits-belongs"→"小鲸只使用母 系群的方言"，因此空格应为mother（而非maternalpod，语法上 应填"其母亲所属的群")。

items.text:
题目 32
答案：pods
PDF 定位：第C段："Residents live in stable groups, or'pods.."

题目 34
答案：mother
PDF 定位：第E段："A calf uses the calls of its maternal pod very precisely. There's no input from the father."
PDF 解析：摘要结构"thegrouptowhichits-belongs"→"小鲸只使用母 系群的方言"，因此空格应为mother（而非maternalpod，语法上 应填"其母亲所属的群")。

questionSections.text:
题目 35
答案：A
PDF 定位：第F段："Apart from theiradvancedmentalabilities..."
PDF 解析："advancedmentalabilities"=高智力/智能。

题目 36
答案：C
PDF 定位：第F段："they are adept at recognising sounds: ideal for communicating in the marine environment."
PDF 解析：对声音敏感、能分辨识别声音。

题目 37
答案：D
PDF 定位：第H段:"Female killer whales... live up to a quarter of a century after they have had their descendants."
PDF 解析：说明寿命很长，尤其是绝经后仍长期存活。

答案：A

questionSections.text:
题目 38
答案：G
PDF 定位：第G段：.. enabling them to share information about food hot spots."
PDF 解析：传递的信息类型示例"=食物热点位置，G段给出具体例子。

题目 39
答案：D
PDF 定位：第D段:"Transients have only a few such calls... Residents have a much more extensive repertoire... each resident pod sticks firmly to its own dialect."
PDF 解析：同一物种内部（居民Vs过客&各居民群）沟通方式差异的明确信息。

题目 40
答案：F
PDF 定位：第F段："Whales have severalbiological attributes that give them an advantage in social learning... advanced mental abilities; adept at recognising sounds .. live in small, stable, multi-generational societies....
PDF 解析：直接罗列有利于文化发展的能力与社会结构。
